subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter hath been received. Praise be to God, it is a mighty proof of steadfastness upon the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل جلیل ثبوت بر صراط مستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
